codeReview.summary: The fix now bases gzip gating on actual outgoing payload bytes in the onSend hook instead of a possibly-missing Content-Length header, and the tightened app test requires gzip plus decompressed-body equivalence for an above-threshold JSON response.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit 88325d9. The implementation satisfies the payload-size gating requirement in src/http/transport.ts and the updated tests in tests/app.test.ts now enforce gzip for an above-threshold negotiated JSON response while checking semantic equivalence after decompression. I did not find blocking or non-blocking issues in the reviewed feature scope.
